channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/5/7)
channel.description:
今天的信息量不小，而且都围绕着你关心的几个核心词。最重磅的消息是**Anthropic和SpaceX达成了算力合作**，这直接导致**Claude Code的使用限制被提高了**，对重度用户是天大的好消息。另外，社区里关于**Codex**的讨论异常火热，包括怎么绕过验证、怎么看它的“道德感”、以及怎么用得更爽。还有一个关于 **AI Agent** 设计的有价值的讨论帖，值得关注。当然，也少不了几个酷炫的GitHub开源项目。
---

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description:
今天的信息量不小，而且都围绕着你关心的几个核心词。最重磅的消息是**Anthropic和SpaceX达成了算力合作**，这直接导致**Claude Code的使用限制被提高了**，对重度用户是天大的好消息。另外，社区里关于**Codex**的讨论异常火热，包括怎么绕过验证、怎么看它的“道德感”、以及怎么用得更爽。还有一个关于 **AI Agent** 设计的有价值的讨论帖，值得关注。当然，也少不了几个酷炫的GitHub开源项目。
---

item.title: aattaran/deepclaude
item.description: Use Claude Code's autonomous agent loop with DeepSeek V4 Pro, OpenRouter, or any Anthropic-compatible backend. Same UX, 17x cheaper. | 近期热门 | 总 1502 stars
item.author: aattaran

item.title: mattpocock/dictionary-of-ai-coding
item.description: AI coding jargon, explained in plain English. | 近期热门 | 总 1157 stars
item.author: mattpocock

item.title: vibeforge1111/keep-codex-fast
item.description: A backup-first Codex skill for keeping local Codex state fast, clean, and recoverable. | 近期热门 | 总 816 stars
item.author: vibeforge1111

item.title: XBuilderLAB/cheat-on-content
item.description: Content is already a cheat-code race—whoever cracks the patterns first wins the traffic. Your auto-evolving ops expert that learns YOUR account, not the global average. The Claude Code workflow behind 1M followers in 1 month. | 近期热门 | 总 796 stars
item.author: XBuilderLAB

item.title: crafter-station/petdex
item.description: Public gallery of animated Codex pets | 近期热门 | 总 770 stars
item.author: crafter-station

item.title: Tommy-yw/RunbookHermes
item.description: Hermes-native AIOps agent for evidence-driven incident response, approval-gated remediation, and runbook learning. | 近期热门 | 总 530 stars
item.author: Tommy-yw

item.title: matthart1983/syswatch
item.description: Single-host system diagnostics TUI. Sibling to netwatch. Twelve tabs, plain-English insights, session scrubber. macOS + Linux. | 近期热门 | 总 372 stars
item.author: matthart1983

item.title: evanphi7/lighthouse-router
item.description: Off-chain DEX route discovery on Solana — pool decoders, multi-hop quoting, and arbitrage cycle detection | 近期热门 | 总 231 stars
item.author: evanphi7
